/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++11 -Wno-write-strings -Wno-deprecated-declarations -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic CMakeFiles/segnet-camera.dir/segnet.cpp.o -o ../../aarch64/bin/segnet-camera   -L/usr/local/cuda/lib64  -L/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/tegra  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda/lib64:/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/tegra:/jetson-inference/build/aarch64/lib:/opt/nvidia/vpi2/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu: /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -lpthread -ldl -lrt ../../aarch64/lib/libjetson-inference.so ../../aarch64/lib/libjetson-utils.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -lpthread -ldl -lrt -lGL -lGLU -lGLEW -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgstapp-1.0 -lgstpbutils-1.0 -lgstwebrtc-1.0 -lgstsdp-1.0 -lgstrtspserver-1.0 -ljson-glib-1.0 -lsoup-2.4 /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libnppicc.so -lnvbuf_utils -lnvinfer -lnvinfer_plugin -lnvparsers -lnvonnxparser /usr/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.5.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.5.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.5.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.5.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.5.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_cudev.so.4.5.0 /opt/nvidia/vpi2/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libnvvpi.so.2.1.6
